intent: TARUMT is a private university in Malaysia offering diploma, degree, and postgraduate programs.
The main campus is located in Setapak, Kuala Lumpur.
Yes, TARUMT is a private university in Malaysia.
It stands for Tunku Abdul Rahman University of Management and Technology.
Yes, TARUMT has campuses across Malaysia.
Yes, TARUMT programs are accredited and recognized.

text: Can international students study at TARUMT?
How many students are in TARUMT?
How can I apply to TARUMT?
intent: You can apply online through the official TARUMT website.
Application can be done online via TARUMT admission portal.
Applications are submitted through TARUMT official website.
Yes, there is a RM60 non-refundable application fee.
Apply early as admission is first-come, first-served.
TARUMT offers January, May/June and September intakes.
Yes, multiple intakes are available each year.
Applicants will be notified if application is incomplete.

text: Do I need documents to apply?
intent: Yes, academic certificates and identification documents are required.

text: What courses are available in TARUMT?
intent: TARUMT offers over 200 programs across multiple fields.

text: What can I study in TARUMT?
intent: You can study business, engineering, IT, science, and more.
Yes, TARUMT offers bachelor degree programs.
Diploma programs usually take 2 to 2.5 years.
Degree programs usually take 3 to 4 years.
Faculties include business, computing, engineering, and science.
You can take majors in business, IT, engineering and more.
Fees vary depending on program and level of study.
Tuition fees vary but are considered affordable.
TARUMT is considered affordable compared to other private universities.
